## Description

What does this PR change and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / code quality
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other (describe):

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`cd backend && make test-e2e-dev` or `uv run pytest tests/unit/ -v`)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or `.env` files committed
- [ ] Migrations included if any Django model was changed (`uv run python manage.py makemigrations`)
- [ ] i18n translation strings added for any new UI text (`{% trans %}` / `gettext`)

## Testing notes

How was this tested? Any edge cases to watch out for?
